subcodes.first_line: O ye kind friends and dearly cherished daughters! I, 'Abdu'l-Bahá, despite physical frailty and inability to endure a journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان و دختران عزیز من عبدالبهاء با وجود ضعف جسمانی و عدم تحمل سفری
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @personal instructions, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
